    How It Works:

    🏆 Compete for prizes every month!

    Track the leaderboard and climb to the top by betting on casino slots and playing with live dealers. Every month, we announce the results — top players win big cash prizes and free spins in the most popular slots!

    💰 Prize pool:
    — $10,000 in real money
    — 5,000 free spins in top slots and live games!

    🎯 How it works?
    Earn points by placing real bets. The more you play, the higher your wager and position on the leaderboard.

    📅 Prize distribution
    At the start of each month, on the 1st, we finalize the leaderboard results: all winners receive their cash prizes and free spins!

    Every player has a chance to reach the top — start playing today!

      Money rain will be distributed to random chat participants. If the number of active users is less, the balance of the amount will be returned to the balance.
      CoinsDrop will be distributed among those who managed to activate it in chat by pressing the button. If the number of active users is less, the balance of the amount will be returned to the balance.
      If you're feeling happy with the service from your personal assistant or VIP host and want to express your gratitude, you can send them tips here
      Rain is a unique, free-to-play rewards feature. Users who have completed KYC can solve a captcha every half-hour to join and receive a share of a prize pool, which is funded by a portion of site spend during that period. Players can even tip rains for added fun and rewards.

      You can choose to donate your balance towards the rain pot. Everyone will see your tip in chat. Minimum tip is 1$. Tipping rain doesn't make you eligible to join.
